serverInfo.name: holdlens
serverInfo.title: HoldLens — SEC 13F superinvestor signal API
serverInfo.description: Normalized 13F filings from 30 tier-1 portfolio managers (Buffett, Ackman, Burry, Klarman, Druckenmiller, et al.) with a composite −100..+100 ConvictionScore. Read-only discovery server — data is served via the public REST+JSON API at /api/v1/*, not via MCP tool calls.

license.summary: 3-tier model: free-for-humans · Pay-Per-Crawl for AI-crawlers · Enterprise monthly for bulk programmatic access

transport.note: REST+JSON. Not an MCP streaming transport; this card advertises the REST surface as MCP-discoverable for LLM clients that support HTTP resource enumeration.

tools.note: Read-only dataset. Future: paid-tier write endpoints (webhook subscriptions) will be exposed here when launched.
